texto: Vyck had often encouraged him to engage an opponent's mind rather than its weapons. often this advice was accompanied by the casual remark that if he couldn't outwit a fox he shouldn't be in the woods.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Gwendolyn Druyor sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. A afirmação “Vyck had often encouraged him to engage an opponent's mind rather than its weapons. often this ad…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, advice, often, útil em momentos de reflexao.
